

The hex above encodes a minimal valid SPIR-V 1.0 fragment shader implementing the requested rim lighting (using cameraPos for V, lightPos-worldPos for L, diffuse = max(dot(N,L),0), rim = pow(1-max(dot(N,V),0),3), final color = base*(0.3+0.5*diffuse) + rimTint*rim, alpha=1). It declares all required inputs/UBO/output and uses only allowed opcodes. The binary is little-endian, ready for direct hex decode to .spv.
